models.title: Harper 8 in. Widespread Brushed Nickel Bath Faucet
source_fields:
Harper 8 in. Widespread Brushed Nickel Bath Faucet by Studio Design Collection is the perfect addition to any residential bathroom. Its sleek, brushed finish and sophisticated design bring a touch of elegance to your space while ensuring durability and functionality.

  • The brushed nickel finish provides a modern look that complements any bathroom decor.
  • Designed for residential use, this faucet ensures reliable performance for everyday needs.
  • Harper 8 in. widespread design allows for easy installation and superior water flow.
  • Studio Design Collection brand guarantees high-quality craftsmanship and stylish aesthetics.
  • Lifetime limited warranty gives you peace of mind with long-term protection.

Upgrade your bathroom with the Harper 8 in. widespread brushed nickel bath faucet and enjoy a blend of style, functionality, and lasting quality.
